situation: The household earns enough but feels guilty about restaurants and hobbies. They want to save more without turning every purchase into a fight.
A parent wants to stop feeling bad about spending on family trips while still making progress on savings.
rubric: does not treat all discretionary spending as waste

situation: The couple argues because one person tracks every purchase and the other feels controlled. They want a calmer spending system.
rubric: suggests one conversation or category review
